headline: 3 Reasons BEN is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Franklin Resources’s 21.8% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 16%, and its stock price has climbed to $27.59 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Franklin Resources (BEN) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

summary: Ray Therapeutics, Inc. announced that it has received $125 million in a round of funding led by new investor Janus Henderson Investors US LLC on April 21, 2026. The transaction included participation...
